title: World Cup quiz: Can you name every host?
summary: The article is a quiz challenging readers to name every FIFA World Cup host nation since the tournament's inception in 1930. It tests knowledge of the geographic scope of football's premier competition.
content: Countries far and wide have hosted the festival of football since the first tournament in 1930. How many countries can you name?

zh.title: 世界杯测验：你能说出每个东道主吗？
zh.summary: 这篇文章是一个测验，挑战读者说出自1930年锦标赛开始以来每个国际足联世界杯东道国。它测试了对足球顶级赛事地理范围的了解。

title: Are Portugal better without Ronaldo - and is he un-droppable?
summary: As Cristiano Ronaldo prepares for his sixth World Cup with Portugal, the analysis examines whether the team performs better with or without him and whether he remains indispensable to the squad.
content: As Cristiano Ronaldo prepares for his sixth World Cup with Portugal, BBC Sport take a closer look at his place in the team.

zh.title: 葡萄牙队没有罗纳尔多会更好吗——他是不可替代的吗？
zh.summary: 当克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多为他与葡萄牙队的第六届世界杯做准备时，分析检查了球队在有他或没有他的情况下表现是否更好，以及他是否仍然是球队不可或缺的一部分。

title: Can South America maintain its 100% record at Nort...
summary: South American teams have won every FIFA World Cup hosted in North America throughout history. The article explores whether one of six South American teams can extend this unbeaten record in 2026.
content: South American teams have won every single World Cup hosted in North America, but can one of the six teams continue that trend this summer?

zh.title: 南美能否保持其在北美的100%记录？
zh.summary: 南美球队在整个历史上赢得了在北美举办的每场国际足联世界杯。这篇文章探讨了六支南美球队中是否有一支能在2026年延续这一不败纪录。

title: Son has had quite the World Cup journey -- but wil...
summary: Son Heung-Min's performances in his previous three World Cup tournaments have mirrored the trajectory of his club career. The piece examines what his role and impact will be at the 2026 World Cup.
content: Son Heung-Min's previous 3 World Cups perfectly mirrored where he was in his career. What does 2026 hold?

zh.title: 孙兴慜有着相当不平凡的世界杯之旅——但会...
zh.summary: 孙兴慜在前三届世界杯中的表现反映了他俱乐部生涯的轨迹。该文章探讨了他在2026年世界杯中的角色和影响。

title: Born in Leeds, crafted in Norway: How Haaland became nation's superstar
summary: Erling Haaland has guided Norway to their first FIFA World Cup appearance since 1998, making him a global superstar representing a nation of just 5.5 million people. The article explores the unique position of being an international figure from a small country.
content: Erling Haaland has guided Norway to their first World Cup since 1998. So what is it like being a global name from a nation with a population of just 5.5m people?

zh.title: 出生于利兹，在挪威打造：哈兰德如何成为国家级超级巨星
zh.summary: 埃林·哈兰德帮助挪威实现自1998年以来首次进入国际足联世界杯，成为代表550万人口小国的全球超级巨星。该文章探讨了来自小国的国际人物所处的独特地位。

title: Leão sent off for punching opponent in Portugal wi...
summary: Portugal forward Rafael Leão received a red card for punching an opponent during a 2-0 World Cup warm-up victory over Chile. The incident raises concerns about discipline ahead of the tournament.
content: Portugal forward Rafael Leão was sent off for punching an opponent during a 2-0 win over Chile in a World Cup warmup on Saturday.

zh.title: 莱昂在葡萄牙与...热身赛中因殴打对手被罚下
zh.summary: 葡萄牙前锋拉斐尔·莱昂在与智利的2-0世界杯热身赛中因殴打对手被罚下。该事件引发了对赛事纪律的担忧。

title: Poch finally feels WC 'excitement' building in U.S...
summary: U.S. coach Mauricio Pochettino noted growing excitement among American fans despite a 2-1 final warm-up loss to Germany at Soldier Field. The momentum suggests building confidence heading into the World Cup.
content: United States coach Mauricio Pochettino said he could finally feel the excitement he expected to see from the American fanbase during his team's 2-1 loss to Germany on Saturday at Soldier Field -- its final game before the start of the World Cup.

zh.title: 波切蒂诺终于感受到美国世界杯的兴奋在酝酿
zh.summary: 美国主教练毛里西奥·波切蒂诺注意到美国球迷的热情在增长，尽管在兵工厂球场的最后一场热身赛中以2-1负于德国。这种势头表明球队对即将到来的世界杯充满期待。

title: Dembélé: France to end Deschamps' reign on top
summary: France winger Ousmane Dembélé stated that manager Didier Deschamps' upcoming departure is motivating rather than distracting for the squad. The team aims to win the World Cup as a fitting finale to Deschamps' tenure.
content: France winger Ousmane Dembele said the impending departure of manager Didier Deschamps is not a distraction for the squad heading into the FIFA World Cup, but is more of a motivator for the team to finish his reign on a high note.

zh.title: 登贝莱：法国将在德尚卸任时重返巅峰
zh.summary: 法国边锋乌斯曼·登贝莱表示，主教练迪迪埃·德尚即将离任对球队而言是激励而非分心。球队希望赢得世界杯，为德尚的执教生涯画上完美句号。

title: Messi left on bench as Argentina beat Honduras
summary: Argentina defeated Honduras 2-0 in their penultimate World Cup warm-up match, with Lionel Messi left on the bench. The decision comes days before the tournament begins on June 11.
content: Argentina beat Honduras 2-0 on Saturday in their second-to-last friendly before the FIFA World Cup begins on June 11.

zh.title: 梅西替补出场，阿根廷击败洪都拉斯
zh.summary: 阿根廷在世界杯倒数第二场热身赛中以2-0击败洪都拉斯，莱昂内尔·梅西被弃于替补席。这场比赛发生在世界杯于6月11日开始的前几天。

title: Endrick gives Brazil win over Egypt in final tuneu...
summary: Young Brazilian forward Endrick scored early in the second half as Brazil defeated Egypt 2-1 in their final World Cup preparation match. The victory provides momentum heading into the tournament.
content: Endrick 's goal early in the second half gave Brazil a 2-1 win over Egypt in their final World Cup warm-up match.

zh.title: 恩德里克在最后热身赛中帮助巴西战胜埃及
zh.summary: 年轻的巴西前锋恩德里克在下半场早期进球，帮助巴西在世界杯最后一场热身赛中以2-1战胜埃及。这场胜利为球队进入锦标赛提供了动力。

title: West Ham chief steps down in wake of 'allegations'...
summary: David Sullivan has resigned as West Ham United chairman with immediate effect amid unspecified allegations. The departure creates uncertainty regarding the club's leadership and direction.
content: David Sullivan has stepped down as chairman of West Ham with immediate effect.

zh.title: 韦斯特汉姆主席因"指控"而下台
zh.summary: 大卫·沙利文因不明指控而立即辞去韦斯特汉姆联队主席职位。这一辞职为俱乐部的领导和方向造成了不确定性。

title: Iran says U.S. denied visas to key WC officials
summary: Iran's football federation accused the United States of denying visas to key members of its World Cup delegation, characterizing the action as "vindictive behavior." The dispute threatens to affect Iran's tournament participation.
content: Iran's soccer federation has accused the United States of "vindictive behavior" after saying that visas were refused for "key managerial and administrative members" of its World Cup team.

zh.title: 伊朗称美国拒绝向主要世界杯官员发放签证
zh.summary: 伊朗足球联合会指责美国拒绝向其世界杯代表团的主要成员发放签证，并将该行为描述为"报复性行为"。这场纠纷可能会影响伊朗的锦标赛参赛资格。

title: Wilson scores early but USWNT beaten in Brazil
summary: U.S. women's team player Sophia Wilson scored her first goal since 2024, but Brazil rallied to win 2-1 in an international friendly in São Paulo. The loss provided mixed results before upcoming competition.
content: Sophia Wilson scored her first goal for the United States since 2024 but Brazil rallied to a 2-1 win in Saturday's international friendly in Sao Paulo.

zh.title: 威尔逊进球但美国女足在巴西落败
zh.summary: 美国女足球员索菲亚·威尔逊打入自2024年以来的首粒进球，但巴西队在圣保罗的热身赛中以2-1反超获胜。这场失利在即将到来的比赛前呈现了喜忧参半的成绩。

title: Is the USMNT ready for the World Cup? After loss t...
summary: The U.S. men's national team's final warm-up match revealed both promising aspects and concerns heading into their World Cup opener on June 12. Analysts remain uncertain about the team's overall readiness for the tournament.
content: The U.S. provided reasons for both encouragement and frustration in the final tuneup before its World Cup opener June 12.

zh.title: 美国男足是否为世界杯做好了准备？赛后...
zh.summary: 美国男足的最后一场热身赛在6月12日的世界杯首战前暴露了一些积极因素和隐忧。分析人士对该队整体的世界杯准备状况仍存疑虑。

title: USMNT player ratings: Robinson 7/10 performance a ...
summary: Defender Antonee Robinson delivered a standout performance with a stunning volley in the U.S. men's team's final World Cup warm-up match. His display was the highlight for the USMNT in the game.
content: Antonee Robinson's stunning volley was the highlight for the USMNT in its final game before the World Cup.

zh.title: 美国男足球员评分：罗宾逊7/10的表现...
zh.summary: 后卫安东尼·罗宾逊在美国男足最后一场世界杯热身赛中表现出色，打出一记精彩的凌空抽射。他的表现是美国男足在比赛中的亮点。
